film.title: Foxcatcher
film.overview: The greatest Olympic Wrestling Champion brother team joins Team Foxcatcher led by multimillionaire sponsor John E. du Pont as they train for the 1988 games in Seoul - a union that leads to unlikely circumstances.

dialogues.dialogue: I want to go to Worlds and win gold.  I want to go to the 88 Olympics in Seoul and win gold.  Good! I'm proud of you.  Are you getting the support that you need?  What do you mean sir?
Smart, Mark... this could be a real good thing for you.  this could be a real good thing for you.  I'm proud of you.  I think you can make something real good for yourself here.  - Yeah? - Yeah.
- That's impressive. - Isn't that impressive?  Thank You.  We're very very proud of him.  I am so proud to introduce my mentor.  He has the ability to look at me and I see where I am in life.

Thank You.  We're very very proud of him.  I am so proud to introduce my mentor.  He has the ability to look at me and I see where I am in life.  I feel his love for me as an athlete and as a human being.
dialogues.cause_raw: for the speaker's achievements and growth
